title: Job Opening Teacher at iDiscoveri Education

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at iDiscoveri Education
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education family as a Teacher in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education:
iDiscoveri Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
